_comment: Drug-like molecule library for distributed virtual screening against SARS-CoV-2 Mpro.
- 5 known Mpro inhibitors tagged is_known_reference: true (REF-0001 to REF-0005)
- ~782 combinatorially generated drug-like molecules from validated scaffolds
Molecular weight target range: 150-500 Da (not all entries may strictly conform).
SMILES are syntactically valid but have NOT been canonicalized or checked with RDKit.

molecules.name: GC-376
molecules.note: Bisulfite prodrug of GC-373; potent Mpro inhibitor

molecules.name: N3 (co-crystallized in 6LU7)
molecules.note: Michael-acceptor peptidomimetic inhibitor co-crystallized in PDB 6LU7

molecules.name: Carmofur
molecules.note: Antineoplastic agent; reported covalent Mpro inhibitor

molecules.name: Lithium_carbonate
